prompt_identifiers.concept: MidJourney is not like other AI art generators

metadata.original_prompt: MidJourney is not like other AI art generators. It has some unique features that set it apart. First, the AI is taught using large sets of images and text, which helps it create images that look more real and have more details. Additionally, MidJourney has the ability to create images in different styles, including realistic and abstract. Additionally, MidJourney offers a range of settings and options that allow users to personalize the images they create.
metadata.source_file: 50 Midjourney Prompts to Create Stunning Ai Art (Sarmah, Kushal) (z-library.sk, 1lib.sk, z-lib.sk).txt
